intro.heading: Introduction to Personal Loans 🤑
intro.content: Are you in need of funds to cover unexpected expenses, weddings, or other personal needs? 🤔 A personal loan can be a great option to consider. With numerous banks and Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs) offering personal loans in India, it can be overwhelming to choose the best one. 🌟 In this article, we will guide you through the process of getting the lowest personal loan interest rate in India 2026 🤑 and help you make an informed decision.

sections.heading: How to Get the Lowest Personal Loan Interest Rate in India 2026 📊
sections.content: To get the lowest personal loan interest rate in India 2026, you need to compare the interest rates offered by different banks and NBFCs. 📈 You can use online loan comparison tools or visit the websites of various lenders to check their interest rates. Additionally, you can also consider factors such as loan tenure, processing fees, and prepayment charges to ensure you get the best deal. 🤑

sections.heading: Comparison of Personal Loan Interest Rates in India 2026 📈
sections.content:
Here is a comparison of personal loan interest rates offered by top banks and NBFCs in India 2026: 📊

🏦 SBI: 10.55% - 14.55% per annum
🏦 HDFC Bank: 10.25% - 17.50% per annum
🏦 ICICI Bank: 10.25% - 17.99% per annum
🏦 Bajaj Finserv: 11.99% - 15.50% per annum
🏦 Axis Bank: 12.00% - 21.00% per annum

As you can see, the interest rates vary significantly across lenders. It is essential to compare these rates and choose the one that best suits your needs. 🤔

sections.heading: Top Banks and NBFCs Offering Low-Interest Personal Loans in India 2026 🏦
sections.content:
Some of the top banks and NBFCs offering low-interest personal loans in India 2026 include: 🌟

✅ SBI: Offers personal loans at interest rates starting from 10.55% per annum
✅ HDFC Bank: Provides personal loans at interest rates starting from 10.25% per annum
✅ ICICI Bank: Offers personal loans at interest rates starting from 10.25% per annum
✅ Bajaj Finserv: Offers personal loans at interest rates starting from 11.99% per annum
✅ Axis Bank: Provides personal loans at interest rates starting from 12.00% per annum

These lenders offer competitive interest rates, flexible loan tenure, and easy repayment options, making them a great choice for borrowers. 🤑

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria and Documents Required for Personal Loans in India 2026 📝
sections.content:
To be eligible for a personal loan in India 2026, you need to meet the following criteria: 📊

👉 Age: 21-60 years
👉 Income: ₹ 15,000-₹ 50,000 per month
👉 Credit Score: 600-750
👉 Employment: Salaried or self-employed

You will also need to provide the following documents: 📁

✅ Identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, passport)
✅ Address proof (Aadhaar card, passport, utility bills)
✅ Income proof (salary slips, Form 16, bank statements)
✅ Credit score report

Make sure you have all the required documents and meet the eligibility criteria before applying for a personal loan. 📝

faqs.q: What is the lowest personal loan interest rate in India 2026?
faqs.a: The lowest personal loan interest rate in India 2026 is 10.25% per annum, offered by HDFC Bank.

faqs.q: How can I get the lowest personal loan interest rate in India 2026?
faqs.a: To get the lowest personal loan interest rate in India 2026, you need to compare the interest rates offered by different banks and NBFCs, and choose the one that best suits your needs.

faqs.q: What are the documents required for a personal loan in India 2026?
faqs.a: The documents required for a personal loan in India 2026 include identity proof, address proof, income proof, and credit score report.
